name: Chocolate Chip Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease the bottom only of a square baking dish, 8 x 8 x 2-inches.
2. Mix brown sugar, margarine, egg, and vanilla in a bowl until well combined.
3. Stir in flour, oats, baking powder, and salt until a dough forms.
4. Spread the dough evenly into the prepared baking dish.
5. Sprinkle chocolate chips and chopped nuts over the top of the dough.
6. Microwave uncovered on high (100%), for 4 minutes; turn the dish one-quarter turn.
7. Continue microwaving until no longer doughy, about 2 to 3 more minutes.
8. Allow the squares to cool completely before cutting into about 2 inch pieces.
Makes 16 Cookies
